wordplay_note: A bounty hunter who may himself be an android
card_description: Phil Resch (meaning "Resch = German for quick/brisk") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*. Ruthless bounty hunter who enjoys killing androids and disturbs Deckard with his coldness. Name note: A bounty hunter who may himself be an android. If a human can lack empathy more than an android the categories collapse. First appears in *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*.
first_work: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
